thesis: Current probability remains low. No high-credibility reporting indicates an active, advanced acquisition process for PayPal; available signals are mostly strategic speculation rather than deal evidence.
method: Daily weighted scoring from reputable business news + SEC/company disclosures + rumor credibility tiering. Speculative or anonymous rumors are capped at low weight.

evidence.signal: No major outlet reports a live acquisition process involving PayPal.
Market discussion focuses on product/strategy execution rather than M&A catalysts.
